nasb.text: for God is not a God of confusion but of peace, as in all the churches of the saints.

esv.text: For God is not a God of confusion but of peace. As in all the churches of the saints,

cnv.text: 因為　神不是混亂的，而是和平的。

ccb.text: 因为上帝不是叫人混乱的上帝，而是赐人平安的上帝。

csbs.text: 因为神不是混乱的神，而是和平的神。 正如在圣徒的各教会那样，
